docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,565.60 FILED BY WEI, WENXING AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEI, WENXING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO INC. $9,686.07 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,776.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF WENXING WEI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURO IS NOT PRESENT. TURO INC. PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEI, WENXING AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.
